source_hash_scope: git ls-files accessibility-tree-viewer excluding build outputs and local.properties

1.text:
Released: 2026-02-17 12:29 AEDT
Initial release with accessibility tree overlay and interactive block controls.

2.text:
Released: 2026-02-17 12:36 AEDT
- Added right-side interactive block overlay with clickable/long-clickable controls
- Added show/hide toggle for right-side overlay
- Added auto-incrementing version with version display at startup
- Fixed: initial tree scan now triggers on service connect
- Reduced log font size for better density
- Log buffer capped at 3000 lines
- Yellow overflow indicator at bottom-right corner

3.text:
Released: 2026-02-17 12:41 AEDT
- Fixed version scheme to 1.<build number>
- Version displayed in overlay log at service startup
- Blocks refresh on scroll and window changes
- Initial tree scan triggers immediately on service connect

4.text:
Released: 2026-02-17 13:00 AEDT
- Version number displayed on the main setup screen

5.text:
Released: 2026-02-17 13:08 AEDT
- Block scanning now uses deepest-first (post-order) traversal
- Prevents large parent containers from creating incorrect mega-blocks
- Consumed nodes excluded from higher-level block calculations

6.text:
Released: 2026-02-17 13:12 AEDT
- Long-press PgUp/PgDn to jump to start/end of log
- Version string pinned as first line (always visible when scrolled)

7.text:
Released: 2026-02-17 13:15 AEDT
- Self-clickable leaf nodes (standalone buttons/icons) now get their own block
- Block text labels scoped to un-consumed children only (no leaked text from deeper blocks)
- Timestamps added to all changelogs

8.text:
Released: 2026-02-17 13:29 AEDT
- Cached tree comparison: skip all updates when accessibility tree unchanged
- Single tree walk replaces two separate passes (log + blocks)
- Internal CachedNode data class for structural equality, independent of log
- Blocks no longer flicker on unchanged screens

9.text:
Released: 2026-02-17 19:00 AEDT
- R button now also hides the log overlay (not just the right-side blocks)
- Button bar (PgUp/PgDn/R/X) is draggable — drag to reposition anywhere
- All buttons are now square (screenWidth/16) with centered text

11.text: Add embedded REST server (NanoHTTPD) on port 8080 for remote automation. Endpoints: /status, /tree, /blocks, /click/{index}, /long-click/{index}. Pinned status line shows server URL. Reduced log buffer to 500 lines.

12.text: Double GitHub Pages verification timeout to 10 minutes.

16.text: Fix F-Droid metadata: changelogs, description, and summary now appear in F-Droid client. Add AEDT publish timestamp to release notes.

18.text: F-Droid summary now shows version string. Build fails if summary exceeds 80 chars.

19.text: F-Droid summary now shows version string. Build fails if summary exceeds 80 chars.

20.text: Replace emoji buttons with Material Design vector icons. Both overlay panels hidden by default on startup.

27.text:
- 14x3 grid layout system for button bar
- Button labels on all 17 buttons
- Rounded corners (20px) on all buttons
- Clickable area extends into grid gaps (no dead pixels)
- Debug grid cell visualization flag
- Close button uses standard button factory

28.text:
- Grid expanded to 14×7 (from 14×3) for multi-row button spans
- Right-side buttons now 3×3 cells (WiFi, Maps, Close, Test, Firefox, Music)
- Left-side buttons 1×3 tall (VolDn, PgUp, Clear, Blocks, VolUp, PgDn, LPanel, RSide)
- Bottom row height factor now configurable constant
- Corner radius increased to 20px

29.text:
- Navigation button opens Waze
- Maps button opens Google Maps directly
- WiFi button uses floating panel (API 29+)
- Maps pin icon, navigation arrow icon
- Fix package visibility for app launchers (Android 11+)
- 40-column grid layout with 4x4 and 5x3 buttons

30.text: Move secrets out of APK into private app storage. Secrets now pushed via REST API at deploy time. Add API Keys UI to MainActivity.

31.text:
- Split button bar into per-button overlay windows for touch pass-through
- Add volume key event detection via onKeyEvent with status indicator buttons
- Log all hardware key events with enum names (e.g. KEYCODE_VOLUME_UP)

33.text:
File transfer API, logging refactor, Node.js runtime, UI icons

- Add REST file transfer endpoints (GET/PUT /files) with Range and Content-Range support
- Add chunked file-transfer.sh client script with automatic resume
- Integrate nodejs-mobile v18.20.4 embedded runtime with JNI bridge
- Extract logging to standalone com.prado.log package (LoggerFactory, Logger, LogBackend)
- Add Material Design icons for button bar
- Update DOM enhancement and accessibility design docs

38.text:
Multi-window awareness for split-screen support

- /whats-on-screen reports all visible apps, layout mode (normal/split), and focused app
- DOM tree report classifies windows by category (Apps, System, Overlay)
- Visible text and interactive element extraction includes all app windows, not just focused

39.text:
- Standardize button label padding with shared constant (2px edge pad)
- Match long-press label color to bottom label (gray)
- Swap Maps and Navigation button positions
- Recents button goes Home first for deterministic state (long-press: 1s delay)

40.text:
Replace Node button with Split View button
- Launches Waze + Tree Viewer, then enters split screen via recents
- Toast notifications at each step with error detection

41.text:
Build system speed improvements (21.5s → 1s incremental builds)
- Persistent Gradle daemon with JDK 17 pinning
- Parallel module builds, build cache, configuration cache
- Skip lint during iterative development

42.text:
SDK extensions module, thread priorities, split screen detection
- New android-sdk-extensions library with ergonomic wrappers for AccessibilityWindowInfo/NodeInfo
- Set thread priorities: URGENT_AUDIO for audio capture, BACKGROUND for logging/archival
- ScreenTypeChecker detects home, recents, split screen, and foreground app state
- Listen to all accessibility event types (typeAllMask)
- Replace implicit 'it' with named lambda parameters project-wide

43.text:
Settings panel detection, coding conventions
- Detect and report settings panel title in screen state
- Log screenState message before posting to sticky notification
- Convert ScreenTypeChecker from file-scope functions to object scope
- Rename systemState() to onAccessibilityEvent()

46.text: Add launch system documentation and GPS tooling

47.text: Add swap split-screen button and AOSP framework reference

48.text: Refactor split-screen swap, media manager, and state aggregator; reorganize button modules and gesture helpers

49.text: Disable MediaManager to fix crash on real devices

50.text:
Add before/after crash debugging logging to MediaManager start/stop lifecycle
Re-enable MediaManager (ENABLE_MEDIA_MANAGER = true)

51.text:
Disable MediaManager (ENABLE_MEDIA_MANAGER = false) to fix crash on overlay start
Update logging documentation with on-device log file path for physical device

52.text:
Re-enable MediaManager with extensive trace logging across all async callbacks
Add lifecycle trace logging to onServiceConnected/onDestroy
Add log level prefix and AEDT timestamp to all log lines
Promote trace calls to debug in DomSnapshotManager and PradoAccessibilityService

53.text: Add second layer of trace logging: PermissionManager poll/dispatch, MediaManager public API (buildStatusSection, buildMediaAudioSnapshotJson, routing, commands), session change listener dispatch, updateSessionSummaryLocked, SettingsMonitorUtil start

54.text: Add safe mode: alternating crash guard that boots into HTTP+tunnel-only mode after a crash, then auto-recovers to normal on next restart.

55.text:
Release 1.55

- Fix F-Droid publish path alignment for GitHub Pages.
- Enforce artifact-branch safety in deploy documentation and workflow.
- Improve deploy reliability guidance for branch/source configuration.

56.text:
Release 1.56

- Add SLF4J + logback-android logging backend with daily file rotation.
- Remove main thread dispatch hop from log path.
- Add blocking flush mode for crash debugging (GlobalConstants kill switch).
- Add --integration-test flag to quick-deploy.sh (placeholder).

57.text:
Release 1.57

- Add GlobalExceptionHandler.wrap for crash recovery in onServiceConnected.
- Add lifecycle trace logging to ButtonBarManager, NotificationManager, PermissionManager, SettingsMonitorUtil.
- Add POST /kill endpoint for remote process termination.
- Add hardKill to HttpServerHost interface.
- Promote DOM snapshot build/action logs from TRACE to DEBUG.
- Add ListenerRegistry.size() method.
- Move GlobalConstants.globalInit from MainActivity to onServiceConnected.

58.text: Fix Media and Audio status not populating in /status endpoint

61.text: Add SYU head unit radio control via REST API (POST /radio/on)

62.text: Add SYU head unit radio control via REST API (POST /radio/on)

63.text:
Stability improvements for exception handling and background workers.

- Standardized thread and coroutine crash wrapping.
- Improved fatal error logging coverage for uncaught exceptions.
- Hardened internal async pipelines to prevent silent thread failures.

64.text:
Build and deploy refresh release.

- Incremented release version for F-Droid guard compliance.
- Published updated signed APK and repository metadata.

65.text:
3D viewer environment and material update.

- Fixed the forest environment map loading path so the viewport skybox and IBL apply correctly.
- Added spotlight intensity control in the 3D demo lighting controls.
- Improved Prado window glass materials for more readable environment reflections.
- Default local deploys now use the debuggable release build, with full release still available explicitly.

66.text:
3D demo defaults now start from the current Prado real-device setup.

- Default car paint starts on Silver
- Default ground mode starts on Flat
- Bloom and SSR now default Off; AO defaults On
- Updated default camera/lighting/material values for the 3D demo
- Fixed startup sun direction so the actual light matches the slider default

67.text:
- Add a symlink-aware filesystem manifest endpoint for repeatable device snapshot capture.
- Improve filesystem snapshot metadata and local loop/alias test coverage.

68.text:
- Add remote zip export for filesystem manifests and automatic host-side unzip/cleanup.
- Add repeatable exclude-prefix filters and record the exact filter set in snapshot metadata and reports.

69.text:
- Expand the current 3D demo and graph tooling updates in the accessibility-tree-viewer app.
- Continue HTTP route and file-transfer refactors, including the filesystem manifest export workflow.
- Keep the packaged release within F-Droid hosting limits by removing oversized HDR assets.

70.text:
- Fix 3D demo environment switching so Turtle resolves app-owned HDR files reliably on Android 13.
- Add internal-storage-first environment lookup and tighten the environment cycle button to only show available choices.
- Continue the 3D demo, logging, and external-asset pipeline work without packaging oversized HDR assets in the APK.

73.text:
Updated Prado Tree Viewer release with current app, bridge server, and tooling changes.

Published: 2026-03-22 22:40 AEDT
